meta.question: What is the path from the TMT Projet root to the Pupil Alignmnet Error Budget analysis?
meta.finalAnswer:
The path from the TMT Project root to the Pupil Alignment Error Budget analysis is:

1. TMT (package)
2. Project (package)
3. Work Packages (package)
4. Telescope (package)
5. WorkPackages::Control (package)
6. Alignment and Phasing System (package)
7. Systems Engineering (package)
8. 10 Analysis (package)
9. Roll-up Analyses (package)
10. Error Budgets (package)
11. Pupil Alignment Error Budget (package)

Full qualified path: TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::10 Analysis::Roll-up Analyses::Error Budgets::Pupil Alignment Error Budget

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("TMT Project"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

}
